MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, CHARLIE B. COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-03-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL; ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT. DEFT'S TRUE NAME AMENDED TO ALBERTS, DANA. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITN AND POSS OF PREMISES PLUS BACK RENT AND DAMAGES. EXHIBIT W/DRWN AND RETURNED TO PLTFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBERT, DANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2791 SIXTEENTH STREET, #31, SAN FRANISCO, CA $1,214.18 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,214.18, LEASE FORFEITED, COMPLAINT AMENDED TO SHOW DFT'S TRUE NAME AS ALBERTS,DANA. COSTS PER COST BILL.
